_metadata.description: Transformers: Super-God Masterforce (Japanese anime, 1988-1989) — NEW characters only
_metadata.scope: Characters debuting in Super-God Masterforce that do NOT already exist in the NA G1 or Headmasters files. The Seacons (already in jp-headmasters-characters.json) are NOT repeated despite appearing in Masterforce with different characterizations.
_metadata.continuity_note: Masterforce is a 'fresh start' — almost entirely new cast. Humans become Transformers via Masterbraces (Headmaster Juniors, Godmasters). Autobot Pretenders shrink to human size. Ginrai is NOT Optimus Prime despite identical transtector.

character_types.Pretender: Ancient Transformers with organic disguise shells
character_types.Godmaster: Humans who merge with transtectors via engine bonding (Western: Powermasters)
character_types.Headmaster Junior: Human children who become Headmasters via Masterbraces

characters.name: Metalhawk
characters.first_appearance: Super-God Masterforce E01 Rise Up!! Pretenders
characters.notes: Leader of the Autobot Pretenders. Disguises as human 'Hawk'. Has been on Earth for 8,000 years. Japanese name: Metalhawk (メタルホーク)

characters.name: Lander
characters.first_appearance: Super-God Masterforce E01 Rise Up!! Pretenders
characters.notes: Autobot Pretender. Lives in New York as a socialite. Western toy counterpart: Landmine. Japanese name: Lander (ランダー)

characters.name: Diver
characters.first_appearance: Super-God Masterforce E01 Rise Up!! Pretenders
characters.notes: Autobot Pretender. Introduces Ginrai to the Autobots. Western toy counterpart: Waverider. Japanese name: Diver (ダイバー)

characters.name: Phoenix
characters.first_appearance: Super-God Masterforce E01 Rise Up!! Pretenders
characters.notes: Autobot Pretender. Gets minimal screen time. Western toy counterpart: Cloudburst. Japanese name: Phoenix (フェニックス)

characters.name: Blood
characters.first_appearance: Super-God Masterforce E01 Rise Up!! Pretenders
characters.notes: Leader of the Decepticon Pretenders. Vampire bat monster form. Sealed in Egyptian pyramids. Western toy counterpart: Bomb-Burst. Japanese name: Blood (ブラッド)

characters.name: Dauros
characters.first_appearance: Super-God Masterforce E01 Rise Up!! Pretenders
characters.notes: Decepticon Pretender. Dinosaur monster form. Sealed beneath Nazca Lines. Western toy counterpart: Skullgrin. Japanese name: Dauros (ドーロス)

characters.name: Gilmer
characters.first_appearance: Super-God Masterforce E01 Rise Up!! Pretenders
characters.notes: Decepticon Pretender. Fish monster form. Sealed in Atlantis. Western toy counterpart: Submarauder. Japanese name: Gilmer (ギルマー)

characters.name: Ginrai
characters.first_appearance: Super-God Masterforce E06 Go Ginrai - Storm of Rage
characters.notes: 19-year-old Japanese-American truck driver from Nagano. Main protagonist. Transtector identical to Optimus Prime. Becomes Super Ginrai (with trailer), then God Ginrai (with Godbomber). NOT Optimus Prime — entirely different character. Japanese name: Ginrai (ジンライ)

characters.name: Lightfoot
characters.first_appearance: Super-God Masterforce E17 The Chojin Warriors the Godmasters
characters.notes: British Godmaster. Son of a scientist. Western toy counterpart: Getaway. Japanese name: Lightfoot (ライトフット)

characters.name: Ranger
characters.first_appearance: Super-God Masterforce E21 The Birth of the Super Godmasters
characters.notes: Canadian park ranger Godmaster. Japanese-exclusive redeco of Joyride. Japanese name: Ranger (レンジャー)

characters.name: Road King
characters.first_appearance: Super-God Masterforce E17 The Chojin Warriors the Godmasters
characters.notes: French Godmaster. Western toy counterpart: Slapdash. Japanese name: Road King (ロードキング)

characters.name: Giga
characters.first_appearance: Super-God Masterforce E10 Super Warriors - The Godmaster Brothers
characters.notes: Male half of the Decepticon Godmaster duo. Husband of Mega. Together they form Overlord. Japanese name: Giga (ギガ)

characters.name: Mega
characters.first_appearance: Super-God Masterforce E10 Super Warriors - The Godmaster Brothers
characters.notes: Female half of the Decepticon Godmaster duo. Wife of Giga. Together they form Overlord. Japanese name: Mega (メガ)

characters.name: Overlord
characters.first_appearance: Super-God Masterforce E10 Super Warriors - The Godmaster Brothers
characters.notes: Combined Godmaster form of Giga (tank) and Mega (jet). Primary Decepticon field commander. Extremely powerful. Japanese name: Overlord (オーバーロード)

characters.name: Buster
characters.first_appearance: Super-God Masterforce E10 Super Warriors - The Godmaster Brothers
characters.notes: German Godmaster. Brother of Hydra. Together they form Darkwings. Western toy counterpart: Dreadwind. Japanese name: Buster (バスター)

characters.name: Hydra
characters.first_appearance: Super-God Masterforce E10 Super Warriors - The Godmaster Brothers
characters.notes: German Godmaster. Brother of Buster. Together they form Darkwings. Western toy counterpart: Darkwing. Japanese name: Hydra (ハイドラー)

characters.name: Darkwings
characters.first_appearance: Super-God Masterforce E10 Super Warriors - The Godmaster Brothers
characters.notes: Combined jet form of Buster and Hydra. Japanese name: Darkwings (ダークウィングス)

characters.name: Doubleclouder
characters.first_appearance: Super-God Masterforce E27 The Doubleclouder Trap
characters.notes: Last Godmaster discovered. Double agent — can adopt both Autobot and Decepticon robot modes. Sides with Decepticons. Western toy counterpart: Doubledealer. Japanese name: Doubleclouder (ダブルクラウダー)

characters.name: Shuta Go
characters.first_appearance: Super-God Masterforce E01 Rise Up!! Pretenders
characters.notes: 13-year-old Japanese boy. Son of Professor Go. Robot form is Go Shooter. Western toy counterpart: Siren. Japanese name: Shūta Gō (周太)

characters.name: Cab
characters.first_appearance: Super-God Masterforce E01 Rise Up!! Pretenders
characters.notes: Orphaned boy from the Karin Islands. Has a parrot and armadillo. Robot form is Cab. Western toy counterpart: Hosehead. Japanese name: Cab (キャブ)

characters.name: Minerva
characters.first_appearance: Super-God Masterforce E01 Rise Up!! Pretenders
characters.notes: French teenage girl. Combat medic. Breakout character of Masterforce. Japanese-exclusive redeco; western counterpart is Nightbeat. Japanese name: Minerva (ミネルバ)

characters.name: Wilder
characters.first_appearance: Super-God Masterforce E05 The Decepticon Headmaster Juniors
characters.notes: Delinquent teenage boy. Western toy counterpart: Fangry. Japanese name: Wilder (ワイルダー)

characters.name: Cancer
characters.first_appearance: Super-God Masterforce E05 The Decepticon Headmaster Juniors
characters.notes: Chinese teenage boy. Eventually defects to help Autobots. Close friend of Browning. Western toy counterpart: Squeezeplay. Japanese name: Cancer (キャンサー)

characters.name: Bullhorn
characters.first_appearance: Super-God Masterforce E05 The Decepticon Headmaster Juniors
characters.notes: Delinquent teenage boy. Western toy counterpart: Horri-Bull. Japanese name: Bullhorn (ブルホーン)

characters.name: Godbomber
characters.first_appearance: Super-God Masterforce E30 Begin the Bomber Project
characters.notes: Non-sentient Autobot drone that combines with Super Ginrai to form God Ginrai. Empathic weapon. Japanese-exclusive. Japanese name: Godbomber (ゴッドボンバー)

characters.name: Sixknight
characters.alt_mode: Cybertronian car / jet / submarine / drill tank / winged wolf / gun
characters.first_appearance: Super-God Masterforce E20 The Autobot Warrior Sixknight
characters.notes: Six-changer Autobot warrior. Member of the Six Clan like Sixshot. Initially a lone warrior, joins the Autobots. Western toy counterpart: Quickswitch. Japanese name: Sixknight (シックスナイト)

characters.name: Grand Maximus
characters.first_appearance: Super-God Masterforce E38 God Ginrai Destroyed!!
characters.notes: Fortress Maximus's younger brother. Has a Pretender shell for his Headmaster component Grand. Japanese-exclusive repaint of Fortress Maximus. Japanese name: Grand Maximus (グランドマキシマス)

characters.name: Browning
characters.first_appearance: Super-God Masterforce E13 Wilder Rides Again!!
characters.notes: Small Decepticon who transforms into a handgun. Given to Cancer as a companion. Loyal and childlike. Japanese-exclusive. Japanese name: Browning (ブローニング)

characters.name: Black Zarak
characters.first_appearance: Super-God Masterforce E32 Overlord - Terror of the Chojin Combo
characters.notes: Scorponok's transtector rebuilt and powered by Devil Z. Merges with Devil Z for the final battle. Black repaint of Scorponok. Japanese name: BlackZarak (ブラックザラック)

characters.name: Devil Z
characters.first_appearance: Super-God Masterforce E03 Kidnapping the Autobot Headmaster Juniors
characters.notes: Super-energy alien being. True leader of the Decepticons in Masterforce. Exists as a pulsating globe of energy. Merges with Black Zarak for the final battle. Japanese name: Devil Z (デビルZ)
